topic: A person using a 'Self-Checkout' machine at a grocery store.

parsed_generation.narration: A single shopper uses a self-checkout at a grocery store. The sequence follows scanning items, completing payment, and collecting the receipt across three shots.

feedback: The prompt stays on the self-checkout topic with a clear three-shot progression and defined camera angles, but it lacks several concrete details from the gold standard (beep audible on scan, price update on screen, and the receipt printing moment). To tighten alignment, add explicit audio cues and UI cues (beep, price display), include the payment action (card tap) and a receipt-print cue, and consider tighter, gold-standard-like timestamps (e.g., [00:00-00:04], [00:04-00:08]).
strengths: Clear three-shot progression focused on the shopper.
Uses specific camera angles (front view, close-up, side-angle).
fixes: Incorporate audio and UI cues (beep after scan, price update on screen, receipt printing).
Tighten timestamp structure to mirror gold standard durations and mention bagging area as applicable.
